verses.kjv: PAUL, and Silvanus, and Timotheus, unto the church of the Thessalonians which is in God the Father and in the Lord Jesus Christ: Grace be unto you, and peace, from God our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ.
verses.bsb: Paul, Silvanus, and Timothy,  To the church of the Thessalonians in God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ:  Grace and peace to you.

verses.kjv: We give thanks to God always for you all, making mention of you in our prayers;
verses.bsb: We always thank God for all of you, remembering you in our prayers

verses.kjv: Remembering without ceasing your work of faith, and labour of love, and patience of hope in our Lord Jesus Christ, in the sight of God and our Father;
verses.bsb: and continually recalling before our God and Father your work of faith, your labor of love, and your enduring hope in our Lord Jesus Christ.

verses.kjv: Knowing, brethren beloved, your election of God.
verses.bsb: Brothers who are beloved by God, we know that He has chosen you,

verses.kjv: For our gospel came not unto you in word only, but also in power, and in the Holy Ghost, and in much assurance; as ye know what manner of men we were among you for your sake.
verses.bsb: because our gospel came to you not only in word, but also in power, in the Holy Spirit, and with great conviction—just as you know we lived among you for your sake.

verses.kjv: And ye became followers of us, and of the Lord, having received the word in much affliction, with joy of the Holy Ghost:
verses.bsb: And you became imitators of us and of the Lord when you welcomed the message with the joy of the Holy Spirit, in spite of your great suffering.

verses.kjv: So that ye were ensamples to all that believe in Macedonia and Achaia.
verses.bsb: As a result, you have become an example to all the believers in Macedonia and Achaia.

verses.kjv: For from you sounded out the word of the Lord not only in Macedonia and Achaia, but also in every place your faith to God-ward is spread abroad; so that we need not to speak any thing.
verses.bsb: For not only did the message of the Lord ring out from you to Macedonia and Achaia, but your faith in God has gone out to every place, so that we have no need to say anything more.

verses.kjv: For they themselves shew of us what manner of entering in we had unto you, and how ye turned to God from idols to serve the living and true God;
verses.bsb: For they themselves report what kind of welcome you gave us, and how you turned to God from idols to serve the living and true God

verses.kjv: And to wait for his Son from heaven, whom he raised from the dead, even Jesus, which delivered us from the wrath to come.
verses.bsb: and to await His Son from heaven, whom He raised from the dead—Jesus our deliverer from the coming wrath.

verses.kjv: FOR yourselves, brethren, know our entrance in unto you, that it was not in vain:
verses.bsb: You yourselves know, brothers, that our visit to you was not in vain.

verses.kjv: But even after that we had suffered before, and were shamefully entreated, as ye know, at Philippi, we were bold in our God to speak unto you the gospel of God with much contention.
verses.bsb: As you are aware, we had already endured suffering and shameful treatment in Philippi. But in the face of strong opposition, we were bold in our God to speak to you the gospel of God.

verses.kjv: For our exhortation was not of deceit, nor of uncleanness, nor in guile:
verses.bsb: For our appeal does not arise from deceit or ulterior motives or trickery.

verses.kjv: But as we were allowed of God to be put in trust with the gospel, even so we speak; not as pleasing men, but God, which trieth our hearts.
verses.bsb: Instead, we speak as those approved by God to be entrusted with the gospel, not in order to please men but God, who examines our hearts.

verses.kjv: For neither at any time used we flattering words, as ye know, nor a cloke of covetousness; God is witness:
verses.bsb: As you know, we never used words of flattery or any pretext for greed. God is our witness!

verses.kjv: Nor of men sought we glory, neither of you, nor yet of others, when we might have been burdensome, as the apostles of Christ.
verses.bsb: Nor did we seek praise from you or from anyone else, although as apostles of Christ we had authority to demand it.

verses.kjv: But we were gentle among you, even as a nurse cherisheth her children:
verses.bsb: On the contrary, we were gentle among you, like a nursing mother caring for her children.

verses.kjv: So being affectionately desirous of you, we were willing to have imparted unto you, not the gospel of God only, but also our own souls, because ye were dear unto us.
verses.bsb: We cared so deeply that we were delighted to share with you not only the gospel of God, but our own lives as well. That is how beloved you have become to us.

verses.kjv: For ye remember, brethren, our labour and travail: for labouring night and day, because we would not be chargeable unto any of you, we preached unto you the gospel of God.
verses.bsb: Surely you recall, brothers, our labor and toil. We worked night and day so that we would not be a burden to anyone while we proclaimed to you the gospel of God.

verses.kjv: Ye are witnesses, and God also, how holily and justly and unblameably we behaved ourselves among you that believe:
verses.bsb: You are witnesses, and so is God, of how holy, righteous, and blameless our conduct was among you who believed.

verses.kjv: As ye know how we exhorted and comforted and charged every one of you, as a father doth his children,
verses.bsb: For you know that we treated each of you as a father treats his own children—

verses.kjv: That ye would walk worthy of God, who hath called you unto his kingdom and glory.
verses.bsb: encouraging you, comforting you, and urging you to walk in a manner worthy of God, who calls you into His own kingdom and glory.

verses.kjv: For this cause also thank we God without ceasing, because, when ye received the word of God which ye heard of us, ye received it not as the word of men, but as it is in truth, the word of God, which effectually worketh also in you that believe.
verses.bsb: And we continually thank God because, when you received the word of God that you heard from us, you accepted it not as the word of men, but as the true word of God—the word which is now at work in you who believe.

verses.kjv: For ye, brethren, became followers of the churches of God which in Judæa are in Christ Jesus: for ye also have suffered like things of your own countrymen, even as they have of the Jews:
verses.bsb: For you, brothers, became imitators of the churches of God in Judea that are in Christ Jesus. You suffered from your own countrymen the very things they suffered from the Jews,

verses.kjv: Who both killed the Lord Jesus, and their own prophets, and have persecuted us; and they please not God, and are contrary to all men:
verses.bsb: who killed both the Lord Jesus and their own prophets, and drove us out as well. They are displeasing to God and hostile to all men,

verses.kjv: Forbidding us to speak to the Gentiles that they might be saved, to fill up their sins alway: for the wrath is come upon them to the uttermost.
verses.bsb: hindering us from telling the Gentiles how they may be saved. As a result, they continue to heap up their sins to full capacity; the utmost wrath has come upon them.

verses.kjv: But we, brethren, being taken from you for a short time in presence, not in heart, endeavoured the more abundantly to see your face with great desire.
verses.bsb: Brothers, although we were torn away from you for a short time (in person, not in heart), our desire to see you face to face was even more intense.

verses.kjv: Wherefore we would have come unto you, even I Paul, once and again; but Satan hindered us.
verses.bsb: For we wanted to come to you—indeed I, Paul, tried again and again—but Satan obstructed us.

verses.kjv: For what is our hope, or joy, or crown of rejoicing? Are not even ye in the presence of our Lord Jesus Christ at his coming?
verses.bsb: After all, who is our hope, our joy, our crown of boasting, if it is not you yourselves in the presence of our Lord Jesus at His coming?

verses.kjv: For ye are our glory and joy.
verses.bsb: You are indeed our glory and our joy.

verses.kjv: WHEREFORE when we could no longer forbear, we thought it good to be left at Athens alone;
verses.bsb: So when we could bear it no longer, we were willing to be left on our own in Athens.

verses.kjv: And sent Timotheus, our brother, and minister of God, and our fellowlabourer in the gospel of Christ, to establish you, and to comfort you concerning your faith:
verses.bsb: We sent Timothy, our brother and fellow worker for God in the gospel of Christ, to strengthen and encourage you in your faith,

verses.kjv: That no man should be moved by these afflictions: for yourselves know that we are appointed thereunto.
verses.bsb: so that none of you would be shaken by these trials. For you know that we are destined for this.

verses.kjv: For verily, when we were with you, we told you before that we should suffer tribulation; even as it came to pass, and ye know.
verses.bsb: Indeed, when we were with you, we kept warning you that we would suffer persecution; and as you know, it has come to pass.

verses.kjv: For this cause, when I could no longer forbear, I sent to know your faith, lest by some means the tempter have tempted you, and our labour be in vain.
verses.bsb: For this reason, when I could bear it no longer, I sent to find out about your faith, for fear that the tempter had somehow tempted you and caused our labor to be in vain.

verses.kjv: But now when Timotheus came from you unto us, and brought us good tidings of your faith and charity, and that ye have good remembrance of us always, desiring greatly to see us, as we also to see you:
verses.bsb: But just now, Timothy has returned from his visit with the good news about your faith, your love, and the fond memories you have preserved, longing to see us just as we long to see you.

verses.kjv: Therefore, brethren, we were comforted over you in all our affliction and distress by your faith:
verses.bsb: For this reason, brothers, in all our distress and persecution, we have been reassured about you, because of your faith.

verses.kjv: For now we live, if ye stand fast in the Lord.
verses.bsb: For now we can go on living, as long as you are standing firm in the Lord.

verses.kjv: For what thanks can we render to God again for you, for all the joy wherewith we joy for your sakes before our God;
verses.bsb: How can we adequately thank God for you in return for our great joy over you in His presence?

verses.kjv: Night and day praying exceedingly that we might see your face, and might perfect that which is lacking in your faith?
verses.bsb: Night and day we pray most earnestly that we may see you face to face and supply what is lacking from your faith.

verses.kjv: Now God himself and our Father, and our Lord Jesus Christ, direct our way unto you.
verses.bsb: Now may our God and Father Himself, and our Lord Jesus, direct our way to you.

verses.kjv: And the Lord make you to increase and abound in love one toward another, and toward all men, even as we do toward you:
verses.bsb: And may the Lord cause you to increase and overflow with love for one another and for everyone else, just as our love for you overflows,

verses.kjv: To the end he may stablish your hearts unblameable in holiness before God, even our Father, at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ with all his saints.
verses.bsb: so that He may establish your hearts in blamelessness and holiness before our God and Father at the coming of our Lord Jesus with all His saints. Amen.

verses.kjv: FURTHERMORE then we beseech you, brethren, and exhort you by the Lord Jesus, that as ye have received of us how ye ought to walk and to please God, so ye would abound more and more.
verses.bsb: Finally, brothers, we ask and encourage you in the Lord Jesus to live in a way that is pleasing to God, just as you have received from us. This is how you already live, so you should do so all the more.

verses.kjv: For ye know what commandments we gave you by the Lord Jesus.
verses.bsb: For you know the instructions we gave you by the authority of the Lord Jesus.

verses.kjv: For this is the will of God, even your sanctification, that ye should abstain from fornication:
verses.bsb: For it is God’s will that you should be holy: You must abstain from sexual immorality;

verses.kjv: That every one of you should know how to possess his vessel in sanctification and honour;
verses.bsb: each of you must know how to control his own body in holiness and honor,

verses.kjv: Not in the lust of concupiscence, even as the Gentiles which know not God:
verses.bsb: not in lustful passion like the Gentiles who do not know God;

verses.kjv: That no man go beyond and defraud his brother in any matter: because that the Lord is the avenger of all such, as we also have forewarned you and testified.
verses.bsb: and no one should ever violate or exploit his brother in this regard, because the Lord will avenge all such acts, as we have already told you and solemnly warned you.

verses.kjv: For God hath not called us unto uncleanness, but unto holiness.
verses.bsb: For God has not called us to impurity, but to holiness.

verses.kjv: He therefore that despiseth, despiseth not man, but God, who hath also given unto us his holy Spirit.
verses.bsb: Anyone, then, who rejects this command does not reject man but God, the very One who gives you His Holy Spirit.

verses.kjv: But as touching brotherly love ye need not that I write unto you: for ye yourselves are taught of God to love one another.
verses.bsb: Now about brotherly love, you do not need anyone to write to you, because you yourselves have been taught by God to love one another.

verses.kjv: And indeed ye do it toward all the brethren which are in all Macedonia: but we beseech you, brethren, that ye increase more and more;
verses.bsb: And you are indeed showing this love to all the brothers throughout Macedonia. But we urge you, brothers, to excel more and more

verses.kjv: And that ye study to be quiet, and to do your own business, and to work with your own hands, as we commanded you;
verses.bsb: and to aspire to live quietly, to attend to your own matters, and to work with your own hands, as we instructed you.

verses.kjv: That ye may walk honestly toward them that are without, and that ye may have lack of nothing.
verses.bsb: Then you will behave properly toward outsiders, without being dependent on anyone.

verses.kjv: But I would not have you to be ignorant, brethren, concerning them which are asleep, that ye sorrow not, even as others which have no hope.
verses.bsb: Brothers, we do not want you to be uninformed about those who sleep in death, so that you will not grieve like the rest, who are without hope.

verses.kjv: For if we believe that Jesus died and rose again, even so them also which sleep in Jesus will God bring with him.
verses.bsb: For since we believe that Jesus died and rose again, we also believe that God will bring with Jesus those who have fallen asleep in Him.

verses.kjv: For this we say unto you by the word of the Lord, that we which are alive and remain unto the coming of the Lord shall not prevent them which are asleep.
verses.bsb: By the word of the Lord, we declare to you that we who are alive and remain until the coming of the Lord will by no means precede those who have fallen asleep.

verses.kjv: For the Lord himself shall descend from heaven with a shout, with the voice of the archangel, and with the trump of God: and the dead in Christ shall rise first:
verses.bsb: For the Lord Himself will descend from heaven with a loud command, with the voice of an archangel, and with the trumpet of God, and the dead in Christ will be the first to rise.

verses.kjv: Then we which are alive and remain shall be caught up together with them in the clouds, to meet the Lord in the air: and so shall we ever be with the Lord.
verses.bsb: After that, we who are alive and remain will be caught up together with them in the clouds to meet the Lord in the air. And so we will always be with the Lord.

verses.kjv: Wherefore comfort one another with these words.
verses.bsb: Therefore encourage one another with these words.

verses.kjv: BUT of the times and the seasons, brethren, ye have no need that I write unto you.
verses.bsb: Now about the times and seasons, brothers, we do not need to write to you.

verses.kjv: For yourselves know perfectly that the day of the Lord so cometh as a thief in the night.
verses.bsb: For you are fully aware that the Day of the Lord will come like a thief in the night.

verses.kjv: For when they shall say, Peace and safety; then sudden destruction cometh upon them, as travail upon a woman with child; and they shall not escape.
verses.bsb: While people are saying, “Peace and security,” destruction will come upon them suddenly, like labor pains on a pregnant woman, and they will not escape.

verses.kjv: But ye, brethren, are not in darkness, that that day should overtake you as a thief.
verses.bsb: But you, brothers, are not in the darkness so that this day should overtake you like a thief.

verses.kjv: Ye are all the children of light, and the children of the day: we are not of the night, nor of darkness.
verses.bsb: For you are all sons of the light and sons of the day; we do not belong to the night or to the darkness.

verses.kjv: Therefore let us not sleep, as do others; but let us watch and be sober.
verses.bsb: So then, let us not sleep as the others do, but let us remain awake and sober.

verses.kjv: For they that sleep sleep in the night; and they that be drunken are drunken in the night.
verses.bsb: For those who sleep, sleep at night; and those who get drunk, get drunk at night.

verses.kjv: But let us, who are of the day, be sober, putting on the breastplate of faith and love; and for an helmet, the hope of salvation.
verses.bsb: But since we belong to the day, let us be sober, putting on the breastplate of faith and love, and the helmet of our hope of salvation.

verses.kjv: For God hath not appointed us to wrath, but to obtain salvation by our Lord Jesus Christ,
verses.bsb: For God has not appointed us to suffer wrath, but to obtain salvation through our Lord Jesus Christ.

verses.kjv: Who died for us, that, whether we wake or sleep, we should live together with him.
verses.bsb: He died for us so that, whether we are awake or asleep, we may live together with Him.

verses.kjv: Wherefore comfort yourselves together, and edify one another, even as also ye do.
verses.bsb: Therefore encourage and build one another up, just as you are already doing.

verses.kjv: And we beseech you, brethren, to know them which labour among you, and are over you in the Lord, and admonish you;
verses.bsb: But we ask you, brothers, to acknowledge those who work diligently among you, who preside over you in the Lord and give you instruction.

verses.kjv: And to esteem them very highly in love for their work’s sake. And be at peace among yourselves.
verses.bsb: In love, hold them in highest regard because of their work. Live in peace with one another.

verses.kjv: Now we exhort you, brethren, warn them that are unruly, comfort the feebleminded, support the weak, be patient toward all men.
verses.bsb: And we urge you, brothers, to admonish the unruly, encourage the fainthearted, help the weak, and be patient with everyone.

verses.kjv: See that none render evil for evil unto any man; but ever follow that which is good, both among yourselves, and to all men.
verses.bsb: Make sure that no one repays evil for evil. Always pursue what is good for one another and for all people.

verses.kjv: Rejoice evermore.
verses.bsb: Rejoice at all times.

verses.kjv: Pray without ceasing.
verses.bsb: Pray without ceasing.

verses.kjv: In every thing give thanks: for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus concerning you.
verses.bsb: Give thanks in every circumstance, for this is God’s will for you in Christ Jesus.

verses.kjv: Quench not the Spirit.
verses.bsb: Do not extinguish the Spirit.

verses.kjv: Despise not prophesyings.
verses.bsb: Do not treat prophecies with contempt,

verses.kjv: Prove all things; hold fast that which is good.
verses.bsb: but test all things. Hold fast to what is good.

verses.kjv: Abstain from all appearance of evil.
verses.bsb: Abstain from every form of evil.

verses.kjv: And the very God of peace sanctify you wholly; and I pray God your whole spirit and soul and body be preserved blameless unto the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ.
verses.bsb: Now may the God of peace Himself sanctify you completely, and may your entire spirit, soul, and body be kept blameless at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ.

verses.kjv: Faithful is he that calleth you, who also will do it.
verses.bsb: The One who calls you is faithful, and He will do it.

verses.kjv: Brethren, pray for us.
verses.bsb: Brothers, pray for us as well.

verses.kjv: Greet all the brethren with an holy kiss.
verses.bsb: Greet all the brothers with a holy kiss.

verses.kjv: I charge you by the Lord that this epistle be read unto all the holy brethren.
verses.bsb: I charge you before the Lord to have this letter read to all the brothers.

verses.kjv: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you. Amen. ¶ The first epistle unto the Thessalonians was written from Athens. THE
verses.bsb: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
